rationale.R1.4: The output mentions prior work on multi-sample reasoning but doesn't explicitly compare to other clinical variant interpretation methods.
rationale.R1.7: There are no explicit citations in the text, though it alludes to relevant works (REVEL, CADD, AlphaMissense).
rationale.RX.1: The output acknowledges uncertainty by discussing tie-breaking rules and mentioning the need for calibration.
rationale.RX.3: The output stays within the scope of strengthening the original text and addressing potential reviewer concerns.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions are introduced in the revised text.
rationale.RX.5: While the output claims to have strengthened the text, it doesn't provide specific details on how sources were used or modified.
